codeReview.summary: Commit 567a75a is tightly scoped and correctly removes the disabled state from all four dashboard header actions in DashboardScreen.tsx (Recover, Export, Policies, Settings). This matches the feature description; no regressions or implementation defects were found in the diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is an undocumented validation nuance when creating a profile to reach Dashboard during manual checks: in this environment, using only the Distribute screen's copy actions may leave "Finish Distribution" disabled, while completing the QR modal path enables progression. Capturing this in shared testing guidance would reduce validator churn.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (session afb06475-021d-4c05-b07e-4fdc944269bc) shows repeated attempts where copy actions kept "Finish Distribution" disabled, then QR flow enabled it; .factory/library/user-testing.md notes prerequisites for Dashboard but does not mention this QR fallback behavior.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill context, and git diff for dashboard-header-enable. The implementation satisfies the feature requirements and is approved with no actionable code issues.
